```r
ps_merged <- readRDS(\~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/Lankau_Lab/Greenhouse_Exmpt_2018/16S/Alpha_div/ps_merged.RDS\)
physeq_filtered = subset_samples(ps_merged, Soil_inoculation != \Sterile\ & Response != \NA\)

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


**Function to calculate Alpha Diversity:**

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuYWxwaGFfZGl2X2YgPSBmdW5jdGlvbihwc2RhdGEsVkFMVUUpe1xuICBwc2RhdGEgPSBzdWJzZXRfc2FtcGxlcyhwc2RhdGEpXG4gIHBzZGF0YSA9IHRheF9nbG9tKHBzZGF0YSx0YXhyYW5rPXJhbmtfbmFtZXMocHNkYXRhKVtWQUxVRV0pXG4gIGFscGhhX2RpdiA9IGVzdGltYXRlX3JpY2huZXNzKHBzZGF0YSxtZWFzdXJlcyA9IGMoXFxDaGFvMVxcLFxcU2hhbm5vblxcLCBcXEludlNpbXBzb25cXCkpXG4gIGRhdGFfdGF4YSA9IHNhbXBsZV9kYXRhKHBzZGF0YSlcbiAgbWVyZ2VkX2RhdGFfdGF4YSA9IG1lcmdlKGRhdGFfdGF4YSxhbHBoYV9kaXYsIGJ5ID0gXFxyb3cubmFtZXNcXClcbiAgcmV0dXJuKG1lcmdlZF9kYXRhX3RheGEpXG59XG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
alpha_div_f = function(psdata,VALUE){
  psdata = subset_samples(psdata)
  psdata = tax_glom(psdata,taxrank=rank_names(psdata)[VALUE])
  alpha_div = estimate_richness(psdata,measures = c(\Chao1\,\Shannon\, \InvSimpson\))
  data_taxa = sample_data(psdata)
  merged_data_taxa = merge(data_taxa,alpha_div, by = \row.names\)
  return(merged_data_taxa)
}

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->




<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuXG5tZXJnZWRfZGF0YV9HZW51cyA9IGFscGhhX2Rpdl9mKHBoeXNlcV9maWx0ZXJlZCw2KVxuI21lcmdlZF9kYXRhX0dlbnVzID0gc3Vic2V0KG1lcmdlZF9kYXRhX0dlbnVzLCBDaGFvMSAhPSAwICYgU2ltcHNvbiAhPSAwKVxuXG4jbWVyZ2VkX2RhdGFfZmFtID0gYWxwaGFfZGl2X2YocGh5c2VxX3RyaW1tZWQsNSlcbiNtZXJnZWRfZGF0YV9BU1YgPSBzdWJzZXQobWVyZ2VkX2RhdGFfQVNWLCBDaGFvMSAhPSAwICYgU2ltcHNvbiAhPSAwKVxuXG5tZXJnZWRfZGF0YV9QaHlsYSA9IGFscGhhX2Rpdl9mKHBoeXNlcV9maWx0ZXJlZCwyKVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r

merged_data_Genus = alpha_div_f(physeq_filtered,6)
#merged_data_Genus = subset(merged_data_Genus, Chao1 != 0 & Simpson != 0)

#merged_data_fam = alpha_div_f(physeq_trimmed,5)
#merged_data_ASV = subset(merged_data_ASV, Chao1 != 0 & Simpson != 0)

merged_data_Phyla = alpha_div_f(physeq_filtered,2)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

*Note*: Ofc there's no singletons because DADA2 removes singletons from our dataset. We deliberately trimmed low abundance because it's probably just noise or is an artifact potentially.   

#Modeling Selection and Diversity:


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxubWVyZ2VkX2RhdGFfR2VudXMxID0gc3Vic2V0KG1lcmdlZF9kYXRhX0dlbnVzLCBTZWxlY3Rpb24ueCAhPSBcXG5vbmVcXClcbm1lcmdlZF9kYXRhX1BoeWxhMSA9IHN1YnNldChtZXJnZWRfZGF0YV9QaHlsYSwgU2VsZWN0aW9uLnggIT0gXFxub25lXFwpXG5tZXJnZWRfZGF0YV9HZW51czEkSXRlcmF0aW9uID0gYXMubnVtZXJpYyhtZXJnZWRfZGF0YV9HZW51czEkSXRlcmF0aW9uKVxubWVyZ2VkX2RhdGFfUGh5bGExJEl0ZXJhdGlvbiA9IGFzLm51bWVyaWMobWVyZ2VkX2RhdGFfUGh5bGExJEl0ZXJhdGlvbilcblxubW9kZWxfQ2hhbzEgPSBsbWVyKENoYW8xIH4gQ2xhZGUgKiBTb2lsX3R5cGUueCAqIFNlbGVjdGlvbi54ICogSXRlcmF0aW9uICsgKDF8SXRlcmF0aW9uL0Jsb2NrKSArICgxfENsYWRlL0dlbm90eXBlKSwgZGF0YSA9IHN1YnNldChtZXJnZWRfZGF0YV9QaHlsYTEsIFNlbGVjdGlvbi54ICE9IFxcbm9uZVxcKSlcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
merged_data_Genus1 = subset(merged_data_Genus, Selection.x != \none\)
merged_data_Phyla1 = subset(merged_data_Phyla, Selection.x != \none\)
merged_data_Genus1$Iteration = as.numeric(merged_data_Genus1$Iteration)
merged_data_Phyla1$Iteration = as.numeric(merged_data_Phyla1$Iteration)

model_Chao1 = lmer(Chao1 ~ Clade * Soil_type.x * Selection.x * Iteration + (1|Iteration/Block) + (1|Clade/Genotype), data = subset(merged_data_Phyla1, Selection.x != \none\))

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYm91bmRhcnkgKHNpbmd1bGFyKSBmaXQ6IHNlZSA/aXNTaW5ndWxhclxuIn0= -->

boundary (singular) fit: see ?isSingular




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuYW5vdmEobW9kZWxfQ2hhbzEpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
anova(model_Chao1)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

Iteration/Block) + (1 | Clade/Genotype) Data: subset(merged_data_Phyla1, Selection.x != )

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

We do see Selection having an effect on Diversity! 



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuYGBgclxubW9kZWxfU2hhbm5vbiA9IGxtZXIoU2hhbm5vbiB+IENsYWRlICogU29pbF90eXBlLnggKiBTZWxlY3Rpb24ueCAqIEl0ZXJhdGlvbiArICgxfEl0ZXJhdGlvbi9CbG9jaykgKyAoMXxDbGFkZS9HZW5vdHlwZSksIGRhdGEgPSBtZXJnZWRfZGF0YV9HZW51czEpXG5gYGBcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
```r
model_Shannon = lmer(Shannon ~ Clade * Soil_type.x * Selection.x * Iteration + (1|Iteration/Block) + (1|Clade/Genotype), data = merged_data_Genus1)

Selection seems to have an effect on the variance but not the average in Shannon diversity…

```r
merged_data_Genus$Iteration = as.factor(merged_data_Genus$Iteration)

merged_data_GenusH = subset(merged_data_Genus, Soil_type.x == \Hancock\)

ggplot_shannon= ggplot(merged_data_Genus, aes(x = Iteration, y = Shannon, fill = Selection.x))+
  geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge(1))+
  geom_dotplot(binaxis = \y\, stackdir = \center\, alpha = 2, dotsize = 0.5, position = position_dodge(1))+
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Clade)

ggplot_shannon

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

/>

<!-- rnb-plot-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

Positively selected soils overall over the levels of Clade and Soil_type contain greater alpha diversity. 

ANOVA table tells us that Selection, Iteration, and Clade had an effect on variance in shannon diveristy. We saw a Clade:Iteration, and Selection:Iteration interaction effects.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxubWVyZ2VkX2RhdGFfR2VudXMkSXRlcmF0aW9uID0gYXMuZmFjdG9yKG1lcmdlZF9kYXRhX0dlbnVzJEl0ZXJhdGlvbilcblxubWVyZ2VkX2RhdGFfR2VudXNXID0gc3Vic2V0KG1lcmdlZF9kYXRhX0dlbnVzLCBTb2lsX3R5cGUueCA9PSBcXFdpbnRlcmZlbGxcXClcblxuZ2dwbG90X3NoYW5ub25XPSBnZ3Bsb3QobWVyZ2VkX2RhdGFfR2VudXNXLCBhZXMoeCA9IEl0ZXJhdGlvbiwgeSA9IFNoYW5ub24sIGZpbGwgPSBTZWxlY3Rpb24ueCkpK1xuICBnZW9tX2JveHBsb3QocG9zaXRpb249cG9zaXRpb25fZG9kZ2UoMSkpK1xuICBnZW9tX2RvdHBsb3QoYmluYXhpcyA9IFxceVxcLCBzdGFja2RpciA9IFxcY2VudGVyXFwsIGFscGhhID0gMiwgZG90c2l6ZSA9IDAuNSwgcG9zaXRpb24gPSBwb3NpdGlvbl9kb2RnZSgxKSkrXG4gIHRoZW1lX2J3KCkrXG4gIGZhY2V0X3dyYXAofkNsYWRlKVxuXG5nZ3Bsb3Rfc2hhbm5vbldcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
merged_data_Genus$Iteration = as.factor(merged_data_Genus$Iteration)

merged_data_GenusW = subset(merged_data_Genus, Soil_type.x == \Winterfell\)

ggplot_shannonW= ggplot(merged_data_GenusW, aes(x = Iteration, y = Shannon, fill = Selection.x))+
  geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge(1))+
  geom_dotplot(binaxis = \y\, stackdir = \center\, alpha = 2, dotsize = 0.5, position = position_dodge(1))+
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Clade)

ggplot_shannonW

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiQmluIHdpZHRoIGRlZmF1bHRzIHRvIDEvMzAgb2YgdGhlIHJhbmdlIG9mIHRoZSBkYXRhLiBQaWNrIGJldHRlciB2YWx1ZSB3aXRoIGBiaW53aWR0aGAuXG4ifQ== -->

Bin width defaults to 1/30 of the range of the data. Pick better value with binwidth.




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
```r
model_InvSimpson1 = lmer(InvSimpson ~ Soil_type.x * Selection.x * Iteration + (1|Iteration/Block) + (1|Genotype), data = subset(merged_data_Phyla1, Clade == \M\))

boundary (singular) fit: see ?isSingular
```r
sum_InvSimpsonM  = summary(InvSimpsonM)
AOV_InvSimpsonM = anova(InvSimpsonM)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->

```r
```r
sum_InvSimpsonM

```r
merged_data_Genus$Iteration = as.factor(merged_data_Genus$Iteration)

merged_data_GenusW = subset(merged_data_Genus, Soil_type.x == "Winterfell")

ggplot_shannonW= ggplot(merged_data_GenusW, aes(x = Iteration, y = Shannon, fill = Selection.x))+
  geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge(1))+
  geom_dotplot(binaxis = "y", stackdir = "center", alpha = 2, dotsize = 0.5, position = position_dodge(1))+
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Clade)

ggplot_shannonW
Bin width defaults to 1/30 of the range of the data. Pick better value with `binwidth`.

model_InvSimpson1 = lmer(InvSimpson ~ Soil_type.x * Selection.x * Iteration + (1|Iteration/Block) + (1|Genotype), data = subset(merged_data_Phyla1, Clade == "M"))

boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
AOV_InvSimpson1 = anova(model_InvSimpson1)
sum_InvSimpson1 = summary(model_InvSimpson1)
sum_InvSimpson2
Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method ['lmerModLmerTest']
Formula: InvSimpson ~ Soil_type.x * Selection.x * Iteration + (1 | Iteration/Block) +      (1 | Genotype)

merged_data_Phyla1$Iteration = as.factor(merged_data_Phyla1$Iteration)

merged_data_PhylaW = subset(merged_data_Phyla1, Soil_type.x == "Winterfell")

ggplot_invsimp= ggplot(merged_data_PhylaW, aes(x = Iteration, y = InvSimpson, fill = Selection.x))+
  geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge(1))+
  geom_dotplot(binaxis = "y", stackdir = "center", alpha = 2, dotsize = 0.5, position = position_dodge(1))+
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Clade)

ggplot_invsimp
Bin width defaults to 1/30 of the range of the data. Pick better value with `binwidth`.

merged_data_Phyla1$Iteration = as.factor(merged_data_Phyla1$Iteration)

merged_data_PhylaH = subset(merged_data_Phyla1, Soil_type.x == "Hancock")

ggplot_invsimp= ggplot(merged_data_PhylaH, aes(x = Iteration, y = InvSimpson, fill = Selection.x))+
  geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge(1))+
  geom_dotplot(binaxis = "y", stackdir = "center", alpha = 2, dotsize = 0.5, position = position_dodge(1))+
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Clade)

ggplot_invsimp

#Modeling Genus Alpha Diversity and Response at Iteration 5:

SI TABLE for Ch3

InvSimpsonA = lmer(Response ~  InvSimpson * Soil_type.x * Selection.x + (1|Genotype) + (1|Block), data = subset(merged_data_Phyla, Iteration == 5 & Clade == "A"))
sum_InvSimpsonA  = summary(InvSimpsonA)
AOV_InvSimpsonA = anova(InvSimpsonA)

InvSimpsonC = lmer(Response ~  Chao1 * Soil_type.x * Selection.x + (1|Genotype) + (1|Block), data = subset(merged_data_Phyla, Iteration == 5 & Clade == "C"))
sum_InvSimpsonC  = summary(InvSimpsonC)
AOV_InvSimpsonC = anova(InvSimpsonC)

InvSimpsonM = lmer(Response ~  InvSimpson * Soil_type.x * Selection.x + (1|Genotype) + (1|Block) , data = subset(merged_data_Phyla, Iteration == 5 & Clade == "M"))
sum_InvSimpsonM  = summary(InvSimpsonM)
AOV_InvSimpsonM = anova(InvSimpsonM)
sum_InvSimpsonM
sum_InvSimpsonC
InvSimpsonM = lmer(Response ~  Shannon * Soil_type.x * Selection.x + (1|Genotype) + (1|Block) , data = subset(merged_data_Genus, Iteration == 5 & Clade == "M"))
sum_InvSimpsonM  = summary(InvSimpsonM)
AOV_InvSimpsonM = anova(InvSimpsonM)
